name: Meatballs in Mushrom Sour Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour milk over bread dressing and allow to soak for 5 to 10 minutes.
2. Mix ground beef, bread dressing mixture, cheese, onions, and ham together. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Form into meatballs of desired size.
4. Brown meatballs either in a frying pan or in an oven at 350°F for 35 minutes.
5. Add drippings from which fat has been removed to the mushroom soup (undiluted).
6. Heat, but do not boil, the mixture.
7. Add sour cream to the mushroom soup a little at a time and stir thoroughly.
8. Do not boil the sauce.
9. Pour the sauce over the meatballs in a casserole dish.
10. Add sauteed mushrooms if desired.
11. Return to an oven at 325°F for 5 to 10 minutes.
12. Serve over boiled rice. Can be made ahead and freezes well.
